title: Property Consultant - Oberoi Mall - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Oberoi Mall - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Oberoi Mall, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Oberoi Mall:
Oberoi Mall is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Mall!
